title: Lot' a Melees (Formerly Marbled's Melees)
description: A mod that adds all sorts of 3D melee weapons and tools
body:
[![BH Partner](https://i.postimg.cc/cJwynrYz/mhs-partnerbanner.png)](https://bisecthosting.com/marbledhubb?r=Modrinth)

## Marbled's Melees
![Marbled's Melees Banner](https://i.postimg.cc/rwDKGnMS/marbledsmeleesbanner.png)

Marbled's Melees is a mod that adds 3D melee weapons and tools for [Forge](https://files.minecraftforge.net/net/minecraftforge/forge/) 1.20.1. This mod requires [Marbled's Core](https://modrinth.com/mod/marbleds-core). Kill your enemies with style with a huge assortment of melee weapons!

## **Features**

- Better Combat compatibilty!
- Melee weapons such as but not limited to; Crowbar, Police Baton, Fire Axe, Machete, Modern Axe, Sledgehammer, Stop Sign

## **Usage**

- You may use this in your modpacks, no credit required but it would be apprecated.
- You may use this in your video, no credit required but it would be appreciated.
- You may NOT re-distribute this mod or its assets ANYWHERE. 

MarbledHubb Studios is proudly partnered with [BisectHosting!](https://bisecthosting.com/marbledhubb?r=Modrinth) When using our code "marbledhubb", you are saving 25% off any gaming server while supporting us by commission, supporting the development of our projects!
